title: Stop the Mob Vote Title Screen.
body: # What is it? - This pack does nothing other than add the #StopTheMobVote thing to the Minecraft title screen to tell Mojang to stop the mob vote. - It also adds a custom splash text to say it again. - also adds a 1 in 100 chance for the splash text to say VOTE CRAB!!! # Why? Literally no reason. The crab lost the mob vote and I looked over at the #StopTheMobVote stuff. # Credits I used the blockbench plugin Minecraft Title Generator to make the logo. I use it all the time and it is a really great plugin. There was recently some updates and there was the Mob Vote font so I saw my chance and took it. The plugin is supper awesome and I am very addicted to it and have made lots of logos for many things.
